Welcome to my website!

I am an undergraduate at the University of Maryland, where I study molecular simulations with Dr. Pratyush Tiwary.

I am double majoring in Biochemistry and Computer Science, and I plan to graduate in May 2021. After that, I am heading to graduate school (although I’m not sure where I’ll be going).

If you want to get in touch with me, the best way to do that is by sending me an email.
